title: ジャパンカップの後に・伝えたい一言

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa! El Condor Pasa! Elll Condooor
Paaaaasssaaa!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A flawless 2,400 meters! Look out, world! The
Phantom Bird has taken off!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Traaainer! I did it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I did it! After all this time...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I won the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I scoop her up in a big hug and carry her like a
plane to the winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's much smaller up in the air than I imagined,
and yet also larger than life.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone! Good things come to those
who wait! And now my biggest dream has finally
come true!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I am El Condor Pasa! Checkmate, Twinkle Series!
Next stop, the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As cheers ring out, the gaze of the crowd is drawn
to one spot in particular.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Spe?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The unsung hero of the Japan Cup, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without her growth and drive to win, the race
wouldn't have been as exciting as it was.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh, a big cheer for my best amiga, Spe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Today was bueno! Superbueno! Is there something
you want to tell me?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What is it, I wonder? A word of congratulations?
Or perhaps you'll swear revenge?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I love you no matter what, so say it, whatever it
is!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I wanna know your true feelings! Let's hear it, Spe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You what? Want to congratulate me? Want to
curse me?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I want a rematch!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Qué?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every jaw in the venue, including El Condor
Pasa's, drops.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Today was so much fun! I want to run with you
more!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I'm asking for a rematch... at the
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh...

text_block_list.name: Trainer
text_block_list.text: Bueno!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear that, everyone?! A challenge! A call
to arms!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Spe and I are both headed to the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's do it, Spe! You, me, and Grass makes three!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is a title match, so it'll be a
battle royale!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whirlwind of battle grows even larger as it
swallows Special Week as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen will be a grand battle of dreams
amongst the three friends.
